ctaText: Contact us for a free consultation and custom networking solution quote.
html:
Networking / Cellular Expansion

Wi-Fi 7 Technology

Tired of losing connectivity? We have the solutions to keep you connected.

Transform your connectivity with professional-grade networking solutions. We design, install, and configure enterprise-level Wi-Fi 7 access points, network gateways, and high-speed POE switches to eliminate dead zones and deliver lightning-fast speeds throughout your property. For areas with poor cellular reception, our advanced indoor and outdoor antenna systems extend strong cellular signals to even the most remote locations, ensuring reliable communication wherever you need it.

Unifi Networking Technology

Our networking solutions feature cutting-edge Unifi technology designed for reliability, performance, and seamless connectivity. Experience the power of Wi-Fi 7 technology with our professional-grade access points featuring Multi-Link Operation (MLO), 320 MHz channels, and speeds up to 30 Gbps.

Network Gateways

Unifi gateways provide powerful routing and firewall capabilities with advanced IDS/IPS (Intrusion Detection and Prevention System) protection. Professional installation and configuration optimize your network's performance and security, keeping your data safe from threats.

Wi-Fi 7 Access Points

Expand your Wi-Fi coverage with strategically placed Unifi Wi-Fi 7 access points. Experience blazing-fast speeds up to 30 Gbps, reduced latency, and superior performance with Multi-Link Operation (MLO) technology that connects devices across multiple frequency bands simultaneously.

POE Network Switches

High-speed Power over Ethernet (POE) switches power and connect your network devices efficiently, including Wi-Fi 7 access points. These switches eliminate the need for separate power adapters while providing fast, reliable network connectivity.

IDS/IPS Security

Advanced Intrusion Detection and Prevention Systems (IDS/IPS) monitor your network traffic in real-time, detecting and automatically blocking potential threats before they can compromise your network. Protect against malicious attacks, unauthorized access, and evolving cyber threats.

Linking Sites Together

Connect multiple buildings or remote locations with high-speed wireless bridges, creating a unified network across your property.

Wireless Bridges

Connect multiple buildings or remote locations without expensive fiber installation. High-speed wireless bridges create reliable network links over long distances, perfect for connecting separate properties, outbuildings, or remote sites.

Seamless Connectivity

Create a unified network across multiple locations. Share internet access, files, and resources between buildings as if they were all on the same local network.

Cost-Effective Solution

Avoid expensive trenching and fiber installation costs. Wireless bridges provide high-speed connectivity at a fraction of the cost of traditional wired solutions.

Cellular Distribution

Eliminate dead zones and dropped calls with comprehensive cellular distribution solutions for indoor and outdoor coverage.

Indoor Antennas

Install advanced cellular distribution antennas inside your premises to boost signal strength in areas with poor reception. These systems bring exceptional cellular signal to distant or hard-to-reach areas within your building.

Outdoor Antennas

Outdoor cellular distribution antennas capture strong signals and distribute them throughout your property. Professional installation ensures optimal placement for maximum signal coverage and reliability.

Enhanced Coverage

Eliminate dead zones and dropped calls with comprehensive cellular distribution solutions. Our systems ensure consistent signal strength even in remote or challenging locations.

Why Choose Professional Networking Solutions

Professional installation and quality equipment ensure reliable connectivity throughout your property.

Enhanced Performance

Optimize your network's speed and reliability with professional-grade equipment including Wi-Fi 7 access points featuring Multi-Link Operation (MLO) and 320 MHz channels. Experience blazing-fast speeds up to 30 Gbps.

Expanded Coverage

Eliminate Wi-Fi dead zones and cellular signal issues with strategically placed Wi-Fi 7 access points featuring advanced mesh networking capabilities. Enjoy consistent connectivity throughout your entire property.

Secure & Reliable

Professional network configuration includes robust security measures with IDS/IPS protection that monitors network traffic in real-time and automatically blocks threats. Enterprise-grade security keeps your network safe.

Fiber Certified

Fiber Certified professionals ensure expert installation and configuration of your network infrastructure. Fiber-optic cabling provides lightning immunity, unlimited distance capability, and exceptional reliability.

Ready to enhance your connectivity?

Contact us for a free consultation and custom networking solution quote.
